creator: imitheos@hotmail.com
text:
I have tried to load the atapicam module so that i can use cdrecord and
other tools that require cam.

I have a ASUS P5AD2 Premium motherboard which has ICH6R and ITE IT8212F.

When i load the module with "kldload atapicam" the system crashes.
I have compiles atapicam in the kernel and it also crashes during the
boot.

At some time i thought that maybe it is the ITE controller's fault and
i disabled it through bios.

Then atapicam worked perfectly and found the nec dvdrw in the ICH6R
controller.

How-To-Repeat: Use ITE IT8212F with atapi devices and load atapicam module
